title: rathbunia gummosa
intro: Rathbunia gummosa, also known as gumweed, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rathbunia gummosa include reducing inflammation, promoting healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
